day1_after_start.name: Me
day1_after_start.text: *The bell rings. The sunset paints the classroom in orange hues. For a first day... it wasn't bad at all.*

day1_after_start_2.name: Me
day1_after_start_2.text: *Should I head home, or see someone a little longer?*

day1_after_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea invited me to the student council room
See Yuna again at the library
Nurse Riin is on my mind for some reason
Visit Ms. Eunsu at the faculty office

day1_after_sea.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea.text: "You came! This is the student council room. It's nice and quiet with just the two of us, right?"

day1_after_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_2.text: "Hey... {name}. It was your first day — wasn't it tough?"

day1_after_sea_3.name: Me
day1_after_sea_3.text: "No, I think I adjusted well thanks to you, Sea."

day1_after_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_4.text: "...Good. I'll do anything to make sure {name} is comfortable here. Anything."

day1_after_sea_5.name: Me
day1_after_sea_5.text: *The weight behind 'anything' bothers me slightly... but she's probably just being nice.*

day1_after_yuna.name: Me
day1_after_yuna.text: *Yuna's already at the library when I arrive. She seems to be organizing her photos.*

day1_after_yuna_2.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_2.text: "Oh, Senpai! You're back? Hehe, this place is my secret hideout. I'll show you my photos — just for you!"

day1_after_yuna_3.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_3.text: *I flip through Yuna's photos. School scenery, cats, sunsets... but the last photo is of a closed door at the end of a dark hallway.*

day1_after_yuna_4.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_4.text: *I was about to ask "What's this?" but Yuna quickly shut the camera off. ...What was that?*

day1_after_riin.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin.text: "My, you're back? Are you still sick, or... did you miss me?"

day1_after_riin_2.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_2.text: "Fufu, just kidding. Come here, I'll make you some tea. It's always quiet here, perfect for sharing secrets."

day1_after_riin_3.name: Me
day1_after_riin_3.text: *I had tea and chatted with Nurse Riin. It was relaxing... but she seemed to ask a little too many detailed questions about my health.*

day1_after_eunsu.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu.text: "Oh, {name}! You came all the way to the faculty office after school? That makes me so happy~"

day1_after_eunsu_2.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu brewed coffee and asked me all sorts of things about school life. She's a warm person.*

day1_after_eunsu_3.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_3.text: "...{name}, did something happen at your previous school? Your transfer reason was a bit unusual..."

day1_after_eunsu_4.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_4.text: *...Unusual? It was just because my parents moved. What's unusual about that? ...I was about to ask, but she changed the subject.*

day1_after_home.name: Me
day1_after_home.text: *I step through the school gate, looking back. Not a bad first day at all.*

day1_after_home_2.name: Me
day1_after_home_2.text: *...Someone seems to be watching me from a third-floor window. The backlight hides their face.*

day1_after_end.name: Me
day1_after_end.text: *I walk home against the sunset. Looking forward to tomorrow.*
